_comment_1: Claude Desktop MCP configuration for sdet-brain-win.
_comment_2: Copy this into %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json then restart Claude Desktop.
_comment_3: Replace <USER> with your Windows username (e.g. dariusz).
_comment_4: Adjust paths to point at the markdown trees you want indexed.
_comment_5: IMPORTANT: this uses sdet-brain-mcp-stdio (NOT sdet-brain-server). Claude Desktop talks MCP over stdio, not HTTP. Use sdet-brain-server only if you want a long-running HTTP daemon (e.g. for the daily.py script).
